TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: United States u United States sa i labu nu amisay a Amilikaan , itiza i 38 00 N, 97 00 W,u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 9,833,517 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 9,147,593 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 685,924 km2. hamin nu tademawan sa 323,995,528. kakalukan umah sa 44.50%, kilakilangan umah sa 33.30%, zumaay henay umah sa 22.20%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Washington, DC . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 4 bulad 7 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Joe Biden, micakat a demiad sa i 2021 a mihca 1 bulad 20 demiad. likisi sumamaday nu Amilika silaad tu ayday a mihcaan tu tulu a mang lima (35000) a malebut a mihcaan, micapi tu ayda a kasisuledaan nu katalakawan nu mihcaan, mahamin nu kitakitay a yadahay nu nanum a ahebalay masaluimeng i Talu sulesuledaan, ahebal han makaala tu cacay a malebut lima a lasubu (1500) a kun-li nu kayakay tu dadan mitulin tu Asia atu amisay a Amilikaan . cacay a mang idaw ku tusaay a malebut, tademaw han idawtu ku mueneng i satipan nu pangkiw a kitakit (tipay a pangkiw . misatadasay a Amilikaan a tademaw namakayda i Ya-cuo (Asia lakuyden nuheni ku kayakay , makatukuh tu mahidaay tu Alaska (A-la-se-cia ťėŅśčČśĖĮŚä†), paluma sa cacayay tu a malebut ku eneng. kilul sa pasayda i nutimulan nu aydaay a Amilika . paluma'sa i nutipan amisa Taypin-yung a dadipasan, nutipan nutimulan a buyu aut likelikenan atu teban nutipan a Mississippi (Mi-si-si-pi-sauwac ŚĮÜŤ•ŅŤ•ŅśĮĒś≤≥) nu dadipasan. (Adenans),ťúćÁöģŚ®ĀŚą©ŚģČśĖĮ(Hopewellians)ŚŹäťėŅťā£ŤĖ©ŚÖ∂ sumamadany a niyadu'ay a binacadan u Ho-Ho-Ka-Mu , A-Tai-Nan-Se (ťėŅśąīŚćóśĖĮ, Adenans), Hupiwi-lianse (ťúćÁöģŚ®ĀŚą©ŚģČśĖĮ, Hopewellians) atu Ana-saci . patideng kunuheni tu niyadu' paluma tu cacanan a papalumaan, idaw ku patidengay tu sadicum masangkakuay a luma', ayam atu bau a waywayan nu nisangan tu lala' kalihalayan nuheni a kakilulan tu sasinzaan caay kaw kakaliwhan. u lalangawan nuheni u nakamuwan ku kakilulan, nuka idaw ku duma a binacadan u sulit ku sulitan, kiluken nuheni ku sulit amisinga. capi nu mihcaan a likisi numi satadasay a tademaw mikilul tu demiad haymaw sa amalawpes, katinenganay nu aydaay a Amilikaan yincumin kumikutaya, idaw ku Hopi a binacadan (Ho-Pi ťúćÁöģśóŹ) atu Zuni a binacada (Cu-Ni Á•ĖŚįľśóŹ). makatukuh satu ku Europe (O-cuo ś≠źśī≤) a tademaw itini i Amilika sa, idaw tu ku tusa a bataan (200) a mang nu tademawan, hakiya nu yadah a yuncumin muenengay i Amilika . misatadasay makatukuhay i pea-mea a Europe (O-cuo ś≠źśī≤) a tademaw u Pea-o Europe a tademaw, nu aydaay a siwmea a nakamuan. makayda kunuheni i Greenland (Ke-lin-lan ś†ľťôĶŤė≠) pasayda i nutipan amuculil, kya makaala tu siwa a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku lima (C.E. 985 a mihcaan, sumanahay a bukes ci Ayzuyke' (Erikthe Red itida i Greenland (Ke-lin-lan ś†ľťôĶŤė≠) patideng tu lalaliwmaahn. (L'Anse aux Meadows)ŤĘęÁôľÁŹĺ. saan ku katuuday, wawa nida ci Lie-Bu itini i siyun cacay a malebut idaw ku cacay (C.E. 1001 a mahcaan mitahaw tunu aydaay a Canada (Cia-na-ta Śä†śčŅŚ§ß) a wali amisan. tawyaay a Pei-o a luma' tu maliwanay itida tu i Newfoundland (Niyu-fung-lan ÁīźŤä¨Ťė≠) amisan a L'Anse aux Meadows (Lan-say-aw-ce Ťė≠Ś°ěŚ•ßŤĆ≤, ) kaadihan. micapitu limaay a mihcaan sa, idaw satu ku Europe (O-cuo ś≠źśī≤) a tademaw makatukuh i Amilikaan (Pia-man ŚĆóÁĺé), milakuuyd tu cacay a lasubu (100) a mihcaan, kya idaw satu ku matenesay nu liyumahan a tahekal. numitadasay a mitahaway a tademaw, mikilimay tu saka tayda i Asia (Ya-cuo šļěśī≤) nu kakaydaan nu balunga. (Christopher Columbus). . sasinganganay nu mitahaway a tademaw namakayda i Genoa (Ze-Nuo-Ya ÁÜĪŤęĺšļě) a Kelun-pu (Christopher Columbus Śď•ŚÄęŚłÉ) uculil nida namakayda i Spain ni-wan ci Isa-paila (Isabella ku mipadangay tu saculil nida. cacay a malebut sepat a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tusa (1492) a mihcaan, Columbus (Ke-lun-pu Śď•ŚÄęŚłÉ) itida i Cia-le-pi bayu a subalan makatukuh, caay kaw katineang alaw mala Amilika a baluhay. cacay a malebut lima a lasubu (1500) a mihcaan u Sipan-ya (Spain itida i Amilikan mitahaw a kalimulakan. (Hernando de Soto) (Francisco V√°zquezde Coronado) Śĺě1522 . ci Huang Pens Le-aw i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (1513) a mihcaan nu aydaay a Florida (Fou-luo-li-ta-cuo šĹõÁĺÖťáĆťĀĒŚ∑ě) makatukuh, cacay a milbut lima a lasubu tulu a bataan siwa (1539) a mihcaan, ci Henadu.sutuo (ŤĶęŚćóŚ§ö‚ÄßÁīĘśČė, Hernando de Soto) sayaway makatukuh i Florida (Fuo-luo-li-ta šĹõÁĺÖťáĆťĀĒ), micumud aca tayda i Misisi-pi a sauwac mitahaw, cacay a malebut lima a lasubu sepat a bataan (1540) a mihcaan, ci Falansise.Keluonatu (ś≥ēŤė≠Ť•ŅśĖĮÁßĎ‚ÄßÁßĎÁĺÖÁīćŚļ¶ Francisco V√°zquezde Coronado) namaka cacay a malebtu lima a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku tusa (1522) a mihcaa mahiya madebung nu Si-pan-ya ku Mexico (Muo-si-ke ŚĘ®Ť•ŅŚď•) pasaydan i amis muculil. . mangalay mikilim tu nakamuwan nu babalaki a Sipuo-laci tukay (Ť•ŅšľĮśčČšłÉŚüéŚłā , amica kunikacaay ka tepa', naculilan mamin ku Yalisan-na a cascasan atu " Tay-pinyun a enal" . (Giovanni da Verrazano), (Amerigo Vespucci). namaka Sipan-ya (Spain a tademaw pasayda i amis micumud sa, aydaay a Amilika nu amisan a kitidaan hamaw han nu O-cuo (Europe mitahaway a tademaw amicumud, nina mitahaway a tademaw pasu ci (ŚźČŚ•ßŚá°Śįľ‚ÄßÁ∂≠śčČŤĖ©Ťęĺ, Giovanni da Verrazano), ci Ciakua. kati-ay atu mala Mei-cuo talu kasinganganan a Yamei-like. wisepu-ci (šļěÁĺéŚą©Śď•‚ÄßÁ∂≠śĖĮśĶ¶Ś•á(Amerigo Vespucci). . Amilika misatadasy u O-cuo (Europe a tademaw ku patidengay tu sakatenesay nu ka kaykunngan sa i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu (1500) a mihcaan nu teban, u Sipan-ya (Spain a tademaw itda i Fuoluo-lita a (augustine (Senaw-kuse-tin ŤĀĖŚ•ßŚŹ§śĖĮšłĀ) patideng. ÁĄ∂ŤÄĆ, . sa, nina kabulawan a kitidaan itini i Amilika nu baluhay a kanatal anikaydaan apatideng sa, nai' ku hahicahicaan a kawaw. tadengaay numikawaway han nui amisay nu Tasi-yung dadipasan nanay a sakabulawan a kitidaan, mahida ci Virginia (Wi-ci-ni-ya Á∂≠ŚźČŚįľšļě), Massachusetts (Ma-sa-cu-say ťļĽŤĖ©ŤęłŚ°ě), New York atu duma nu cacay a bataan a kitidaan, itida hantu yadah yadah ku nakaka O-cuo (Europe ay a mabulaway nu tademaw. sabaw tu pitu (17) a seci mahka tayniay i Peime-ingkuo kabulawan a kitidaan u Ing-kuo (United Kingdom a tademaw ku yadahay, duma hantu namaka He-lan(Netherlands , Zuy-tin (Sweden ,De-kuo (Germany , Fa-kuo (France , maudang idaw ku namaka Suke-lan atu Pei-ayel-lan (Ireland a mabulaway. idaw kumiliyasay tu luma' han umilaliway tuni kalepacawan, zhengzhi yapo, midis tu kiwkay atu mipatay. mabulaway tayni i Amilika yadah ku hahinian sa, sadikuday satu kunuheni patideng tu sabaw tu tulu (13) nu caaya kalecad a kabulawan nu kitidaan. nina picidekayn itini i tuluay a kitidaan ku kakatinengan. śģĖśįĎśôāšĽ£ COLONIAL PERIOD8 . kabulawan sa a zitay COLONIAL PERIOD8, mitadasay a mabulaway a tademaw han patideng i lilis dadipasan a Tasi-yung atu pasaydaay i bayuay a sawacan nu lilililisan. wali amis idaw ku kilang mitahap tu buyu, ulala hantu nanu kasisuledaan a zitay nika lasuan nu kuli tu liwan a ba'tu, nanuman saka lihalaysan amicukamas, Sining-kelan England a kitidaan nu Masa-cuse' , Kannay-di-ke' atu Luode-subal , mapalekal tu nisanga'an tu kilanga,babutingan,misangan tu balunga atu sasiwbayan tu sakaudip. tebanay a kabulawan nu kitidaan mapulung tu Niw-ye (New York atu Pinsi-funi-ya , nu mabulaway atu yincumin nikalecabayan, u nikapapadang atu nika cinlaw ka talawan anika pulungan. amica kuyu nikasasiwbayan atu nikalecabayan, anu saahebal satu kumabulaway a tademaw, idaw ku malakalungay a tademaw mangalay misalihalay sa laliw satu.

,d…ô-kuo (g…ôrmanj , fa-kuo (fran ¶…ô , maudaŇč idaw ku namaka suk…ô-r~…ĺan atu p…ôi-aj…ôr~…ĺ-r~…ĺan (ir…ôr~…ĺand a mabur~…ĺawaj. idaw kumir~…ĺijasaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ńßan umir~…ĺar~…ĺiwaj tuni kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, zńß…ôŇčzńßi japo, midis tu kiwkaj atu mipataj. mabur~…ĺawaj tajni i amir~…ĺika jadańß ku ńßańßinian sa, sadikudaj satu kunuńß…ôni patid…ôŇč tu sabaw tu tur~…ĺu (**) nu ¶aaja kar~…ĺ…ô mabur~…ĺawaj a tad…ômaw ńßan patid…ôŇč i r~…ĺir~…ĺis dadipasan a tasi-juŇč atu pasajdaaj i bajuaj a sawa ¶an nu r~…ĺir~…ĺir~…ĺir~…ĺisan. war~…ĺi amis idaw ku kir~…ĺaŇč mitańßap tu buju, ur~…ĺar~…ĺa atu nikar~…ĺ…ô ¶abajan, anu saańß…ôbar~…ĺ satu kumabur~…ĺawaj a tad…ômaw, idaw ku mar~…ĺakar~…ĺuŇčaj a tad…ômaw maŇčar~…ĺaj misar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj sa r~…ĺar~…ĺiw satu.
S.FORM: United States u United States sa i labu nu amisay a Amilikaan , itiza i 38 00 N, 97 00 W,u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 9,833,517 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 9,147,593 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 685,924 km2. hamin nu tademawan sa 323,995,528. kakalukan umah sa 44.50%, kilakilangan umah sa 33.30%, zumaay henay umah sa 22.20%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Washington, DC . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 4 bulad 7 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Joe Biden, micakat a demiad sa i 2021 a mihca 1 bulad 20 demiad. likisi sumamaday nu Amilika silaad tu ayday a mihcaan tu tulu a mang lima (35000) a malebut a mihcaan, micapi tu ayda a kasisuledaan nu katalakawan nu mihcaan, mahamin nu kitakitay a yadahay nu nanum a ahebalay masaluimeng i Talu sulesuledaan, ahebal han makaala tu cacay a malebut lima a lasubu (1500) a kun-li nu kayakay tu dadan mitulin tu Asia atu amisay a Amilikaan . cacay a mang idaw ku tusaay a malebut, tademaw han idawtu ku mueneng i satipan nu pangkiw a kitakit (tipay a pangkiw . misatadasay a Amilikaan a tademaw namakayda i Ya-cuo (Asia lakuyden nuheni ku kayakay , makatukuh tu mahidaay tu Alaska (A-la-se-cia ťėŅśčČśĖĮŚä†), paluma sa cacayay tu a malebut ku eneng. kilul sa pasayda i nutimulan nu aydaay a Amilika . paluma'sa i nutipan amisa Taypin-yung a dadipasan, nutipan nutimulan a buyu aut likelikenan atu teban nutipan a Mississippi (Mi-si-si-pi-sauwac ŚĮÜŤ•ŅŤ•ŅśĮĒś≤≥) nu dadipasan. (Adenans),ťúćÁöģŚ®ĀŚą©ŚģČśĖĮ(Hopewellians)ŚŹäťėŅťā£ŤĖ©ŚÖ∂ sumamadany a niyadu'ay a binacadan u Ho-Ho-Ka-Mu , A-Tai-Nan-Se (ťėŅśąīŚćóśĖĮ, Adenans), Hupiwi-lianse (ťúćÁöģŚ®ĀŚą©ŚģČśĖĮ, Hopewellians) atu Ana-saci . patideng kunuheni tu niyadu' paluma tu cacanan a papalumaan, idaw ku patidengay tu sadicum masangkakuay a luma', ayam atu bau a waywayan nu nisangan tu lala' kalihalayan nuheni a kakilulan tu sasinzaan caay kaw kakaliwhan. u lalangawan nuheni u nakamuwan ku kakilulan, nuka idaw ku duma a binacadan u sulit ku sulitan, kiluken nuheni ku sulit amisinga. capi nu mihcaan a likisi numi satadasay a tademaw mikilul tu demiad haymaw sa amalawpes, katinenganay nu aydaay a Amilikaan yincumin kumikutaya, idaw ku Hopi a binacadan (Ho-Pi ťúćÁöģśóŹ) atu Zuni a binacada (Cu-Ni Á•ĖŚįľśóŹ). makatukuh satu ku Europe (O-cuo ś≠źśī≤) a tademaw itini i Amilika sa, idaw tu ku tusa a bataan (200) a mang nu tademawan, hakiya nu yadah a yuncumin muenengay i Amilika . misatadasay makatukuhay i pea-mea a Europe (O-cuo ś≠źśī≤) a tademaw u Pea-o Europe a tademaw, nu aydaay a siwmea a nakamuan. makayda kunuheni i Greenland (Ke-lin-lan ś†ľťôĶŤė≠) pasayda i nutipan amuculil, kya makaala tu siwa a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku lima (C.E. 985 a mihcaan, sumanahay a bukes ci Ayzuyke' (Erikthe Red itida i Greenland (Ke-lin-lan ś†ľťôĶŤė≠) patideng tu lalaliwmaahn. (L'Anse aux Meadows)ŤĘęÁôľÁŹĺ. saan ku katuuday, wawa nida ci Lie-Bu itini i siyun cacay a malebut idaw ku cacay (C.E. 1001 a mahcaan mitahaw tunu aydaay a Canada (Cia-na-ta Śä†śčŅŚ§ß) a wali amisan. tawyaay a Pei-o a luma' tu maliwanay itida tu i Newfoundland (Niyu-fung-lan ÁīźŤä¨Ťė≠) amisan a L'Anse aux Meadows (Lan-say-aw-ce Ťė≠Ś°ěŚ•ßŤĆ≤, ) kaadihan. micapitu limaay a mihcaan sa, idaw satu ku Europe (O-cuo ś≠źśī≤) a tademaw makatukuh i Amilikaan (Pia-man ŚĆóÁĺé), milakuuyd tu cacay a lasubu (100) a mihcaan, kya idaw satu ku matenesay nu liyumahan a tahekal. numitadasay a mitahaway a tademaw, mikilimay tu saka tayda i Asia (Ya-cuo šļěśī≤) nu kakaydaan nu balunga. (Christopher Columbus). . sasinganganay nu mitahaway a tademaw namakayda i Genoa (Ze-Nuo-Ya ÁÜĪŤęĺšļě) a Kelun-pu (Christopher Columbus Śď•ŚÄęŚłÉ) uculil nida namakayda i Spain ni-wan ci Isa-paila (Isabella ku mipadangay tu saculil nida. cacay a malebut sepat a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tusa (1492) a mihcaan, Columbus (Ke-lun-pu Śď•ŚÄęŚłÉ) itida i Cia-le-pi bayu a subalan makatukuh, caay kaw katineang alaw mala Amilika a baluhay. cacay a malebut lima a lasubu (1500) a mihcaan u Sipan-ya (Spain itida i Amilikan mitahaw a kalimulakan. (Hernando de Soto) (Francisco V√°zquezde Coronado) Śĺě1522 . ci Huang Pens Le-aw i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (1513) a mihcaan nu aydaay a Florida (Fou-luo-li-ta-cuo šĹõÁĺÖťáĆťĀĒŚ∑ě) makatukuh, cacay a milbut lima a lasubu tulu a bataan siwa (1539) a mihcaan, ci Henadu.sutuo (ŤĶęŚćóŚ§ö‚ÄßÁīĘśČė, Hernando de Soto) sayaway makatukuh i Florida (Fuo-luo-li-ta šĹõÁĺÖťáĆťĀĒ), micumud aca tayda i Misisi-pi a sauwac mitahaw, cacay a malebut lima a lasubu sepat a bataan (1540) a mihcaan, ci Falansise.Keluonatu (ś≥ēŤė≠Ť•ŅśĖĮÁßĎ‚ÄßÁßĎÁĺÖÁīćŚļ¶ Francisco V√°zquezde Coronado) namaka cacay a malebtu lima a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku tusa (1522) a mihcaa mahiya madebung nu Si-pan-ya ku Mexico (Muo-si-ke ŚĘ®Ť•ŅŚď•) pasaydan i amis muculil. . mangalay mikilim tu nakamuwan nu babalaki a Sipuo-laci tukay (Ť•ŅšľĮśčČšłÉŚüéŚłā , amica kunikacaay ka tepa', naculilan mamin ku Yalisan-na a cascasan atu " Tay-pinyun a enal" . (Giovanni da Verrazano), (Amerigo Vespucci). namaka Sipan-ya (Spain a tademaw pasayda i amis micumud sa, aydaay a Amilika nu amisan a kitidaan hamaw han nu O-cuo (Europe mitahaway a tademaw amicumud, nina mitahaway a tademaw pasu ci (ŚźČŚ•ßŚá°Śįľ‚ÄßÁ∂≠śčČŤĖ©Ťęĺ, Giovanni da Verrazano), ci Ciakua. kati-ay atu mala Mei-cuo talu kasinganganan a Yamei-like. wisepu-ci (šļěÁĺéŚą©Śď•‚ÄßÁ∂≠śĖĮśĶ¶Ś•á(Amerigo Vespucci). . Amilika misatadasy u O-cuo (Europe a tademaw ku patidengay tu sakatenesay nu ka kaykunngan sa i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu (1500) a mihcaan nu teban, u Sipan-ya (Spain a tademaw itda i Fuoluo-lita a (augustine (Senaw-kuse-tin ŤĀĖŚ•ßŚŹ§śĖĮšłĀ) patideng. ÁĄ∂ŤÄĆ, . sa, nina kabulawan a kitidaan itini i Amilika nu baluhay a kanatal anikaydaan apatideng sa, nai' ku hahicahicaan a kawaw. tadengaay numikawaway han nui amisay nu Tasi-yung dadipasan nanay a sakabulawan a kitidaan, mahida ci Virginia (Wi-ci-ni-ya Á∂≠ŚźČŚįľšļě), Massachusetts (Ma-sa-cu-say ťļĽŤĖ©ŤęłŚ°ě), New York atu duma nu cacay a bataan a kitidaan, itida hantu yadah yadah ku nakaka O-cuo (Europe ay a mabulaway nu tademaw. sabaw tu pitu (17) a seci mahka tayniay i Peime-ingkuo kabulawan a kitidaan u Ing-kuo (United Kingdom a tademaw ku yadahay, duma hantu namaka He-lan(Netherlands , Zuy-tin (Sweden ,De-kuo (Germany , Fa-kuo (France , maudang idaw ku namaka Suke-lan atu Pei-ayel-lan (Ireland a mabulaway. idaw kumiliyasay tu luma' han umilaliway tuni kalepacawan, zhengzhi yapo, midis tu kiwkay atu mipatay. mabulaway tayni i Amilika yadah ku hahinian sa, sadikuday satu kunuheni patideng tu sabaw tu tulu (13) nu caaya kalecad a kabulawan nu kitidaan. nina picidekayn itini i tuluay a kitidaan ku kakatinengan. śģĖśįĎśôāšĽ£ COLONIAL PERIOD8 . kabulawan sa a zitay COLONIAL PERIOD8, mitadasay a mabulaway a tademaw han patideng i lilis dadipasan a Tasi-yung atu pasaydaay i bayuay a sawacan nu lilililisan. wali amis idaw ku kilang mitahap tu buyu, ulala hantu nanu kasisuledaan a zitay nika lasuan nu kuli tu liwan a ba'tu, nanuman saka lihalaysan amicukamas, Sining-kelan England a kitidaan nu Masa-cuse' , Kannay-di-ke' atu Luode-subal , mapalekal tu nisanga'an tu kilanga,babutingan,misangan tu balunga atu sasiwbayan tu sakaudip. tebanay a kabulawan nu kitidaan mapulung tu Niw-ye (New York atu Pinsi-funi-ya , nu mabulaway atu yincumin nikalecabayan, u nikapapadang atu nika cinlaw ka talawan anika pulungan. amica kuyu nikasasiwbayan atu nikalecabayan, anu saahebal satu kumabulaway a tademaw, idaw ku malakalungay a tademaw mangalay misalihalay sa laliw satu.
